_comment: v2.3 - five new signals from empirical 40-case analysis: (1) domain bias (forms vs db/models disambiguation, fixes 5 close failures), (2) error_code (models.E028 -> checks files), (3) upper_const (FILE_UPLOAD_PERMISSION -> conf/global_settings.py), (4) mgmt_command (sqlmigrate -> commands/sqlmigrate.py), (5) migration gate tightened to require explicit migration filename, not just word 'migration'.
